measures.jurisdiction: Grant County Public Hospital District No. 5
measures.title: Multi-year Levy Lid Lift For Health Care Services
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the hospital district levy lid for health care services at the Mattawa Community Medical Clinic, with up to a 6% limit factor for 2027 through 2035.
measures.cost_line: Up to $0.75 per $1,000 of assessed value for 2027 collection.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
